Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Murin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Murin is a mind-reading raven gifted to Leah by the Avernus Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Murin is a raven that makes a sound like a gurgling purr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Murin is a raven that can sense and possibly manipulate thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Murin is a bird that accompanies Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Murin is a raven bound to Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Murin is connected to Leah and the Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Murin thinks Leah is an idiot for fighting directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Murin is a bird that can communicate mentally with Leah.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
